title: Grilled Lamb Skewers with Crunchy Uruguayan Twist
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make grilled lamb skewers dish with a crunchy Uruguayan twist, perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, Uruguayan salsa criolla, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread the lamb cubes onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each cube.
5. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C) for medium-rare.
6. While the lamb is cooking, toast the crunchy chopped cilantro in a small skillet over medium heat for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
7. Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes.
8. Sprinkle the toasted cilantro over the lamb skewers and serve immediately.
